privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to construct a completely new 3D model of a D-shaft motor hub without any pre-existing dataset. The expected output file path (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/d_shaft_hub.slvs), 20.0mm outer diameter, 5.0mm inner diameter, 2.0mm flat distance, and 10.0mm extrusion depth are all strictly verified against the explicit task instructions and the verifier's parametric constraints.
